reference: Thank you for asking. This may not be due to the beta blocker or the heart palpitations. There are certain conditions that could be the likely cause of your seizures. The late onset of grand mal seizures is one of them. You have not mentioned your age and gender, which is necessary to discuss certain conditions that are highly related to this information. I hope you can understand. Have a nice day.
text: Thank you for asking. This may not be due to the beta blocker or the heart palpitations. There are certain conditions that could be the likely cause of your seizures. The late onset of all seizures is one of them. You have not mentioned your age and gender, which is necessary to discuss certain conditions that are highly related to this information. I hope you can understand. Have a nice day.
